title: Intraductal proliferative lesions of the breast: morphology, associated risk and molecular biology.
journal_full: Modern pathology : an official journal of the United States and Canadian Academy of Pathology, Inc
abstract: The main objectives of this review are (1) to review the histological criteria and terminology for usual ductal hyperplasia, atypical ductal hyperplasia, flat epithelial atypia and ductal carcinoma in situ; (2) to provide an overview of the risk of breast cancer associated with these various lesions; (3) to discuss established and emerging data on the molecular biology and pathogenesis of these lesions and (4) to discuss management when detected in diagnostic needle core and surgical diagnostic specimens.
